title: AI Image Generation Mission
description: A spy mission to make a one-of-a-kind picture with AI!

scenes.speech: Image Agent! Today's mission is to make art with AI! 🎨
scenes.title: Mission Briefing: Image Generation Operation
scenes.content: Your task is to finish one original image using an AI image tool. Three success conditions: include subject, place, and mood; generate at least three times; pick a final image and explain why.

scenes.speech: AI image generation turns 'words into pictures' like magic!
scenes.title: What is AI Image Generation?
scenes.content: Midjourney, DALL-E, and Stable Diffusion are AIs that produce a single image from a sentence. The more concrete your words, the closer the picture gets to what you imagined.
scenes.highlight:
Common tools:
- Midjourney
- DALL-E
- Stable Diffusion

scenes.speech: Your prompt should always include subject, place, and mood!
scenes.title: 3-Element Prompt
scenes.content: Always include 'who is the subject', 'where are they', and 'what's the mood'. The picture stays focused. Add color or time of day if it still feels off.
scenes.highlight:
3-element template:
Subject: white cat
Place: space station
Mood: futuristic blue light

scenes.speech: Specifying a 'style' totally changes the vibe!
scenes.title: Art Style
scenes.content: Saying 'watercolor', 'pixel art', or 'Studio Ghibli style' transforms the same subject into completely different art. Save the words you love for next time.
scenes.highlight:
Style examples:
- Watercolor
- Pixel art
- 3D render
- Comic style

scenes.speech: Send the prompt and make three versions!
scenes.title: Operation: Three Versions
scenes.content: Generate three versions of the same subject with only the style changed. The differences make your taste visible. Pick a favorite and write down why you chose it.
scenes.highlight:
Compare:
A: Watercolor
B: Pixel art
C: 3D render

scenes.speech: If it's not what you wanted, use 'negative prompts' too!
scenes.title: Negative Prompts
scenes.content: If you wanted a night scene but got a day scene, list what to avoid. 'Exclude daytime, bright backgrounds' steers the generator more accurately.
scenes.highlight:
How to avoid:
- 'Exclude X'
- 'Do not use X'
- 'Replace X with Y'

scenes.speech: Give your chosen image a title and a one-line comment!
scenes.title: Make It a Work
scenes.content: It stops being 'just a generated image' once you add a title and a short comment. Even one line on 'why this picture' is enough to make it a piece.
scenes.highlight:
Work template:
- Title
- One-line concept
- Style used

scenes.speech: Mission complete! Submit your work to earn 450 points! 🎉
scenes.title: Mission Complete!
scenes.content: AI image generation is less about 'drawing' and more about 'guiding with words'. Every word in your prompt builds the world inside the frame.
